flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Colorado Colorado Springs rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $10.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Colorado Colorado Springs rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.2k → $24.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Colorado Colorado Springs fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Colorado Colorado Springs rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (23.1% → 28.2%).
